home.hero_description: Upload a photo of your medicine or describe your symptoms to get dosage info, warnings, side effects, and alternatives — free, no login required.
home.feature_scan_desc: Snap a photo of any medicine strip, box, or tablet. Our OCR pipeline extracts the name instantly.
home.feature_symptom_desc: Describe what you're feeling and get a list of medicines commonly used to treat those symptoms.
home.feature_multilingual_desc: Get results in Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Marathi, Gujarati, Kannada, or English.
home.feature_free_desc: No account needed. No data sold. All searches are anonymous.

scan.title: Scan Medicine
scan.subtitle: Take or upload a clear photo of your medicine packaging, strip, or tablet to identify it instantly.
scan.camera_hint: On mobile, you can use your camera directly
tips: Photograph the medicine name clearly — strip, box, or blister pack
Ensure good lighting and avoid blurry or angled shots
Indian brand names (Crocin, Dolo) may not always be found — try the generic name
Works best with printed text; handwritten labels may not be recognized
scan.search_link: Know the medicine name? Search by name or symptom →

search.title: Search Medicines
search.subtitle: Describe your symptoms or search by medicine name to get dosage info, side effects, and more.
search.symptom_hint: Press Enter or , to add · Backspace to remove
search.name_tip: Tip: Indian brand names (Crocin, Dolo) may not be found. Use generic names for better results.
search.scan_link: Have the medicine in hand? Scan it instead →

result.empty_scan: We couldn't identify a medicine from the image. Try a clearer photo with the medicine name visible.
result.empty_symptom: No medicines matched those symptoms. Try different or fewer symptoms.
result.empty_name: This medicine wasn't found in our database. Try a generic name like 'Ibuprofen' instead.

common.disclaimer: MediScan provides general information only. Always consult a qualified doctor or pharmacist before taking any medication. Do not self-medicate.
common.disclaimer_short: Not medical advice. Consult a doctor before use.

footer.disclaimer: MediScan is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the guidance of your doctor or qualified health provider.
footer.copyright: © {year} MediScan. Free to use. No data collected.
